steps.title: Identify what the passage defends about multiple interpretations
steps.content: The passage concludes that multiple interpretations are valid and legitimate—“it is difficult to justify the claim that the listener has misunderstood the piece.” For this conclusion to logically follow, the blank verb must describe what enables or sustains these many valid interpretations.

steps.title: Select the verb that allows validity
steps.content:
The blank requires a verb meaning the composition upholds or sustains multiple valid interpretations. Support means exactly this—to uphold something as legitimate.

The other choices either oppose interpretations (refute), exclude them (omit), or avoid them (evade).

That confirms C is correct.
